title: The Natural Resource Lifecycle Impacted by E-Waste
description: A flowchart illustrating how improper e-waste management disrupts natural cycles and pollutes key environmental resources.
relationships: Manufacture extracts finite natural resources -> Product is used and discarded -> Improper disposal leads to toxic leaching -> Contaminates Soil -> Leachate pollutes Groundwater & Surface Water -> Open burning releases toxic fumes into Air -> Contamination of all three resources harms Ecosystems & Human Health
